provenance: Civic-only material minted via the add-material-raw skill, DECISIONS.md Art register FIFTH revision (Eli 2026-07-15): a physical clone of brick (identical density/hardness/flammability/conductivity/heatCapacity/value/tags/light/features) so the art-mapping can give ONLY the King's Bond (K12) street-facing frontage wall a colonnade/baluster sprite (content/art/kenney/art-mapping.json) without repainting every plain brick wall in the district. No physical/simulation difference from brick whatsoever - this id exists purely to be a distinct art-resolution key.
notes: Byte-identical physical stats to brick.json; see that file for the reasoning behind each value. This material is never expected to appear anywhere except gen_docks_surface.py-tagged frontage walls.
